response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in full-stack development and TypeScript, but the seniority level is higher than required and some skills are not directly aligned with the job requirements.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript and full-stack development
Experience with various technologies and frameworks
concerns: Seniority level is higher than required
Some skills are not directly aligned with the job requirements
Lack of specific experience with PostgreSQL and Nest.js
